title: GommeHD.net
description: A Modpack for the server GommeHD.net
body:
The GommeHD Modpack is a community made modpack for the server GommeHD.net.
This Modpack features perfomance Mods and pvp essentials.
You may ask yourself.
What server is GommeHD?
GommeHD is a german minecraft server that features minigames for newer version like Skywars or Bedwars.
Even if you dont want to play GommeHD, on other servers in the newer versions this Modpack is probably for you!
![GommeHD Modpack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45bf7f44f6c8fdb9ca0388da287f57b907a55be2_0.webp)
